MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION
Off Calendar Sep-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant The Endup, LLL's Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Appear For Deposition In San Francisco is granted on the condition that Defendant pay the reasonable costs of Plaintiff's airfare and lodging. All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
